title: Sheet Pan Maple-Teriyaki Salmon & Veggies
description: One-pan salmon dinner with maple-soy glaze and roasted vegetables.
instructions: Whisk 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp maple syrup, 1 tsp grated ginger, and 1 tsp rice vinegar for glaze.
Toss 2 cups broccoli florets, 1 sliced zucchini, and 1 sliced bell pepper with 1 tbsp olive oil and spread on a lined sheet pan.
Nestle 4 salmon fillets among the veggies and brush with glaze.
Bake 15–20 minutes, until salmon flakes easily.
notes: Serve over rice or quinoa. Leftovers make great lunch bowls.
